user.title: Set up HA Smart Display
user.description: Enter the IP address of your display device.

pairing.title: Pair with {device_name}
pairing.description: Enter the 6-digit code shown on the display at {host}.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the display. Make sure it is on the same network and the app is running.
error.invalid_code: Incorrect pairing code. Check the display and try again.

abort.already_in_progress: Setup is already in progress for this display.

data_description.photo_urls: Comma-separated list of image URLs to slideshow on the clock screen.
data_description.auto_ambient_lux: Switch to ambient mode when lux drops below this value. Leave blank to disable.
